posts.title: Transfer Records pagination update: idLessThan mode, pageNum deprecated
posts.summary: Transfer Records now supports idLessThan pagination mode; the pageNum parameter is deprecated.

posts.title: WebSocket books1 channel push frequency optimized to 10ms
posts.summary: WebSocket order book channel (books1) push frequency optimized to 10ms for classic accounts.

posts.title: New off_close orderSource enum value added to futures historical orders
posts.summary: Added 'off_close' (Delisting Liquidation) enum value to the orderSource response parameter.

posts.title: liqPrice field added to futures historical order responses
posts.summary: New 'liqPrice' field added to futures historical order responses.

posts.title: WebSocket ADL notification channel and FAQ update
posts.summary: WebSocket now includes a new ADL notification channel. New FAQ entry Q15 added to documentation.

posts.title: isRwa field added to contract information API
posts.summary: New 'isRwa' field added to contract information API responses.

posts.title: WebSocket futures equity channel and order placement Broker API Code support
posts.summary: WebSocket introduces a new futures equity channel. Order placement channel now supports passing Broker API Code for rebates.

posts.title: New Maximum Openable Quantity and Estimated Liquidation Price API endpoints
posts.summary: New Maximum Openable Quantity API endpoint and Estimated Liquidation Price API endpoint added.

posts.title: Three new broker commission inquiry interfaces launched
posts.summary: Three new broker commission inquiry interfaces launched for total commission, order commission, and rebate information.
